title: MV幻想冒险
description:
Journey through a sprawling Medieval Fantasy realm​ teetering on the brink of destruction. In an age where magic clashes with steel, ancient prophecies awaken, and kingdoms fall to shadow. You are the last hope, destined to gather the realm's protectors.

Recruit 13 distinct heroes, from noble knights and holy clerics to cunning rogues and powerful battle-mages. Each character brings a rich personal history and unique skills essential for survival. Arm them with power through Randomly Generated Weapons; every sword, axe, and staff is a one-of-a-kind artifact forged by chance, featuring unique magical properties and devastating special effects.

Engage in deep, satisfying turn-based combat that rewards strategy and synergy. Too busy to grind? Our System​ ensures your party grows stronger and collects epic loot even while you are away.

Explore a world of dragons, castles, and forgotten ruins. Will you restore the light to this dark medieval age?
description_short: Deeply immersive turn-based RPG. Brave a mysterious world, explore dangerous maps, and uncover the lore. Outsmart foes by exploiting weaknesses, unleashing skills, and mastering formations. Loot gear to customize heroes and build your dream team from countless lineup combos.
